title: MetaCannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''MetaCannon''' was a type of [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] artillery weapon that was capable of firing a variety of projectiles into both orbit and onto the ground.

The MetaCannon was one of the largest field artillery pieces that could be drop-deployed aboard the landing craft used by Chiss forces in the [[Swarm War]]. It was designed to fire [[Charric/Legends|charric]] [[maser]] beams, [[Blaster/Legends|blaster bolts]], or old-fashioned shell projectiles, perhaps including delivery systems for chemical and biological agents. This was accomplished by changing the [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]], but the weapon was unwieldy, and could not always react well to changing enemy tactics.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
